Bug Tracker — Test Reports

Latest main · ${SHORT_SHA} · ${TIMESTAMP} · run #${RUN_NUMBER}

  • Backend Unit Tests — Go coverage

    go test + coverage profile rendered as HTML

  • Frontend Unit Tests — Jest coverage

    jest --coverage with html reporter

  • API Tests — Playwright report

    HTTP-level integration tests, no browser

  • E2E Tests — Playwright report

    Browser tests against the full docker-compose stack

  • Performance Tests — k6 report

    Load test + threshold pass/fail summary
